name: codex-history-suite
description: Build, move, search, trace, export, and natively restore portable evidence-first Codex history.

interface.shortDescription: Portable, evidence-first memory for Codex history.
interface.longDescription: Codex History Suite provides a resource-guarded cross-platform builder, streaming multi-device deltas with precomputed knowledge and semantic state, progressive retrieval, a portable offline evidence viewer, and native session restoration over local Codex transcripts, claims, tool traces, and artifact CAS.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build or query my local Codex history knowledge base, trace or export original evidence, or restore an old thread as a native Codex session.
